lowcode.model/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to a release compatible with Java 21.
lowcode.model/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.

lowcode.model/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation.
lowcode.model/pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not recognize or correctly handle Java 21 language features or bytecode.
